name: golang-github-geertjohan-go.incremental-dev
title: golang-github-geertjohan-go.incremental-dev
summary: Go package providing type- and concurrency-safe incremental counters
description:
Go package providing type- and concurrency-safe incremental counters
This Go package provides access to atomic integers that can be
tested, incremented and set in a type- and concurrency-safe manner.
Objects are protected by a mutex and available for all signed and
unsigned integer types in Go.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-geertjohan-go.incremental-dev because Go package providing type- and concurrency-safe incremental counters.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-geertjohan-go.incremental-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-geertjohan-go.incremental-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-geertjohan-go.incremental-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
